framework.name: OpenID Foundation: offline-attenuated delegation chains 'largely unsolved'
framework.description: The OpenID Foundation explicitly identifies revocation across offline-attenuated delegation chains as 'largely unsolved.' This confirms that recursive OAuth delegation (gap_2) lacks standards-body solutions.
framework.raw_quote: The OpenID Foundation identifies revocation across offline-attenuated delegation chains as 'largely unsolved.'

source.title: [PDF] Structural Equivalence Between Memory Consistency Models ... - arXiv
